Module com.cuatrifasico.battleshi
Package com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.entities

Class Cell

java.lang.Object
com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.entities.Cell
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public final class Cell extends Object implements Serializable
Represents a single cell on a board: its coordinate, its current visual/logical state, and (if any) the ship occupying it.
See Also:

  • Constructor Details

    • Cell

      public Cell(Coordinate coordinate)
      Creates a new, empty water cell at the given coordinate.
      Parameters:
      coordinate - The board position this cell represents.

  • Method Details

    • getCoordinate

      public Coordinate getCoordinate()
      Returns:
      This cell's coordinate.

    • getState

      public CellState getState()
      Returns:
      This cell's current state.

    • setState

      public void setState(CellState state)
      Updates this cell's state.
      Parameters:
      state - The new state to assign.

    • getOccupyingShip

      public Ship getOccupyingShip()
      Returns:
      The ship occupying this cell, or null if it is empty water.

    • assignShip

      public void assignShip(Ship ship)
      Assigns a ship to this cell and marks it as CellState.SHIP.
      Parameters:
      ship - The ship that occupies this cell.

    • clear

      public void clear()
      Clears this cell back to empty, unshot water. Used by the placement phase when picking up an already-placed ship to move it elsewhere, and by the "restart placement" action.

    • isAlreadyShot

      public boolean isAlreadyShot()
      Returns:
      true if this cell has already been fired upon (i.e. its state is neither CellState.WATER nor CellState.SHIP).
